modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst in response to an email and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues with using outlines in OneNote shortcuts

full_description_text: User is having trouble with outlines in OneNote shortcuts. They want to know how to use outlines effectively. This issue is causing some confusion and needs clarification.
short_description: Issues with using outlines in OneNote shortcuts
description: User is having trouble with outlines in OneNote shortcuts. They want to know how to use outlines effectively. This issue is causing some confusion and needs clarification.
